description: Extremely repetitive passage using the same sentence frame ten times
passage: The implications of climate change are far-reaching. The implications of climate change are profound. The implications of climate change are devastating. The implications of climate change are undeniable. The implications of climate change are urgent. The implications of climate change require immediate action. The implications of climate change demand our attention. The implications of climate change cannot be overstated. The implications of climate change affect every nation. The implications of climate change will shape our future.
